penalties.description: Task appears incomplete - final suture cutting phase and slit closure assessment cannot be confirmed from the visible frames.

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement between models on task completion status. Claude identified incomplete task with missing suture cutting phase, while GPT-4o reported full completion. Given the severity of incomplete task penalties in FLS scoring and Claude's specific identification of missing final phases, the incomplete assessment takes precedence. The longer completion time from Claude is used as it aligns with the incomplete task finding.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's longer time aligns with incomplete task assessment, while GPT's shorter time conflicts with its claim of full completion

claude_value.description: Task appears incomplete - final suture cutting phase and slit closure assessment cannot be confirmed from the visible frames.

gpt_value.description: The suture path deviated slightly from the marked target.

disagreements.rationale: Incomplete task is an automatic zero condition in FLS scoring. Claude's specific identification of missing final phases takes precedence over GPT's minor deviation penalty

disagreements.resolution: Used Claude's phase list without suture_cut
disagreements.rationale: Consistent with incomplete task finding - if suture cutting phase cannot be confirmed, it should not be listed as detected
Incomplete task results in automatic zero score regardless of other performance metrics
